purpose: Reproducibility pin. Documents the dataset window and ticker mapping used in the published benchmark. Running `make reproduce` fetches data at this end_date and asserts the per-asset diagnostics against results/<asset>_diagnostics.json.
license_note: Yahoo Finance Terms of Service prohibit data redistribution. This repo ships code only; you fetch the data yourself.

tolerance.note: Small drift may occur if Yahoo retroactively adjusts a historical close. The tolerance prevents flaky tests while still catching real divergence.
